Disney canceled a planned $1B investment and licensing deal less than one hour after learning of the shutdown.: The three-year agreement would have given Sora users access to over 200 Disney, Marvel, Pixar, and Star Wars characters.
User downloads crashed 66% in three months, from 3.3M peak to 1.1M by February 2026.: After a viral launch in November 2025 with 3.33 million downloads, engagement collapsed as novelty faded and competitors like Runway Gen-4 and Kling 2.0 offered faster generation at lower per-clip costs.
Monthly consumer spending peaked at $540K before declining to $367K.
The headline figure, reported by multiple outlets following the shutdown announcement, is that Sora was losing approximately $1 million per day in compute costs alone.

Monthly downloads peaked at approximately 3.33 million in November 2025 across iOS and Google Play combined.
December installs fell 32% month-over-month.
